title: Mozzarella-Crusted Chicken with Roasted Tomatoes & Garlic Bread
description: HelloFresh fan favorite — juicy chicken breasts topped with a melted mozzarella and herb crust, served with roasted cherry tomatoes and crispy garlic bread. Italian-inspired comfort food at its finest.
instructions: Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C). Toss cherry tomatoes with 1 tbsp olive oil, salt, and pepper. Spread on a baking sheet and roast 15–20 minutes until blistered and bursting.
Make garlic butter: mix softened butter with 2 minced garlic cloves, Italian seasoning, and a pinch of salt. Slice bread in half lengthwise and spread garlic butter on cut sides.
Pound chicken breasts to ¾-inch thickness. Season with salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
Heat 2 tbsp olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat. Sear chicken 3–4 minutes per side until golden.
Top each chicken breast with 2 slices of fresh mozzarella. Transfer skillet to oven. Bake 8–10 minutes until cheese is melted and bubbly and chicken reaches 165°F.
During the last 5 minutes, add garlic bread to the oven (cut-side up) and toast until golden.
Serve chicken topped with roasted tomatoes, fresh basil leaves, and a drizzle of balsamic glaze. Serve garlic bread alongside.
tips: Fresh mozzarella melts more beautifully than shredded — it's worth using here.
The balsamic glaze adds a sophisticated sweet-tangy note; it's available pre-made in most grocery stores.
For a caprese-style version, add a few basil leaves under the mozzarella before baking.
Leftover roasted tomatoes are incredible on toast or stirred into pasta.
